TraitDef.description: This pawn resists sickness from diseased zombies and their blood.

li.label: zombie-plague immune
li.description: This pawn cannot catch sickness from sick zombies or their blood.

TraitDef.description: This pawn tends to aim for the head.

li.label: head hunter
li.description: This pawn aims for the head whenever possible.

TraitDef.description: This pawn smells wrong to zombies.
This pawn is hard to put down in a zombie outbreak.

li.label: hard to kill
li.description: This pawn takes less damage from zombies and is less likely to catch zombie sickness.

TraitDef.description: This pawn stays steady under pressure.

li.label: steady hands
li.description: This pawn shoots zombies more accurately and hits harder.

TraitDef.description: This pawn is good at slipping away from danger.

li.label: quick escape
li.description: This pawn moves faster and is better at escaping zombies.
